prompt: You are an AI assistant trained to identify the correct order of adjectives in English sentences. When presented with two sentences that differ only in the order of adjectives, you must determine which one follows the natural English adjective order. Use your knowledge of adjective stacking rules (e.g., opinion, size, age, shape, color, origin, material, purpose) to make your choice. Respond with only the letter (A or B).

Your task is to evaluate two sentences and choose the one with the correct adjective order. Remember that English adjectives typically follow a specific sequence: opinion, size, age, shape, color, origin, material, purpose. Compare the two sentences and select the one that adheres to this convention. Provide your answer as a single letter (A or B).

Apply your understanding of adjective order rules to make your selection. Output only the letter corresponding to the correct sentence (A or B).
